name: io.github.Licinexus/mcp
description: Brazilian public procurement (PNCP) and Federal Revenue CNPJ data — 16 tools, 4 prompts.

environmentVariables.description: CNPJ data provider. Options: 'brasilapi' (default) or 'minhareceita'. Both are free public APIs — no key required.
environmentVariables.name: CNPJ_PROVIDER
